content.speakerText: Did you follow me on Instagram? I just posted my beach vacation photos!
content.speakerTextCn: 你关注我Instagram了吗？我刚发了海滩度假的照片！

options.text: Already followed! Your pics are amazing 😍
I don't have an Instagram account.
I'll follow you next week when I have time.
Why do you keep asking? It's annoying.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了非正式语气 'Already followed!' 和 'amazing'，符合原对话中 'fire' 的积极回应风格。选项2虽然真实，但缺乏回应的社交礼貌；选项3拖延回应，不符合即时确认的语境；选项4语气敌对，不符合友好社交场景。

content.speakerText: Hey, did you hit follow on my TikTok? I posted that dance challenge!
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，你关注我TikTok了吗？我发了那个舞蹈挑战！

options.text: I saw it on your story—great job!
I don't know who you are.
I'll follow you if you follow me back.

content.explanation: 正确答案用 'I saw it on your story' 表达了间接关注，符合非正式语境中常见的委婉回应。选项2过于冷漠，选项3时间错误（不确认当前状态），选项4带有交易语气，不符合自然社交表达。

content.speakerText: You haven't followed me on Twitter yet, right? I just tweeted about the new concert!
content.speakerTextCn: 你还没关注我Twitter吧？我刚发了关于新演唱会的推文！

options.text: Oops, my bad—I'm on it right now!

content.explanation: 正确答案使用 'Oops, my bad' 和 'I'm on it right now' 表达了承认疏忽并立即行动，符合原对话中 'gimme a sec' 的补救语气。选项2虽然真实，但回避了互动；选项3与话题无关；选项4具有攻击性，不符合友好确认场景。

content.template: I'd like ___ follow you on Instagram.
content.hint: 表达‘想要做某事’的固定搭配
content.knowledgePoint: would like to do（表达意愿的固定搭配）

content.template: I saw your post—___ me a sec, I'll follow you now.
content.hint: 非正式口语中表示‘给我一点时间’的缩略表达
content.knowledgePoint: gimme = give me（非正式口语缩略）

content.template: Your photos are ___! I'm obsessed with your content.
content.hint: 年轻人常用俚语，形容‘非常棒、超赞’

content.speakerText: Did you follow me on Instagram? I posted that new coffee shop pic.
content.speakerTextCn: 你关注我Instagram了吗？我发了那家新咖啡馆的照片。
expectedAnswers: Already followed! Your pics are so cool 😎
Oops, I totally forgot—I'll do it right now!
I don't use IG much, but I saw your story and loved it!
evaluationCriteria: 是否准确回应了对方的确认请求（关注状态明确）
是否使用了场景关键词（follow, pic, IG, story）和非正式语气（gimme, fire, cool）
表达是否自然流畅，符合年轻人社交语境

content.speakerText: Hey, have you followed me on TikTok? I just posted my cooking video!
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，你关注我TikTok了吗？我刚发了烹饪视频！
expectedAnswers: Already on it! Your recipe looks delicious 🍳
I haven't yet—gimme two seconds, I'm following now!
I don't do TikTok, but I saw it on your Instagram story—looks amazing!
evaluationCriteria: 是否清晰回应是否已关注或计划关注
是否使用了场景相关表达（follow, gimme, saw it on story）
语气是否自然、有活力，符合社交媒体互动习惯

content.speakerText: You still haven't followed me on Twitter! I just tweeted about the concert—don't miss it!
content.speakerTextCn: 你还没关注我Twitter呢！我刚发了演唱会的推文——别错过了！
expectedAnswers: My bad! I just followed you—thanks for the reminder!
I follow you, but I'm not checking my feed much lately.
I saw your tweet and retweeted it—so excited for the concert!
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确回应关注状态（已关注/未关注/间接确认）
是否使用了恰当的非正式回应（my bad, thanks for the reminder）
是否体现社交礼貌和积极情绪，避免指责或冷漠
